headline: CF Industries Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: CF Industries (NYSE:CF) reported first-quarter 2026 adjusted EBITDA of $983 million, as executives said strong operations and a tightening global nitrogen market supported results heading into the North American spring application season.
